items.t: Understanding the Transformer Architecture: A Deep Dive
items.sum: An in-depth exploration of the transformer architecture that powers modern large language models, from self-attention mechanisms to positional encoding.
Practical techniques to reduce your Kubernetes cloud spending by up to 40% including right-sizing, spot instances, and autoscaling best practices.

items.t: Advanced Async Patterns in Rust: Beyond Tokio Basics
items.sum: Exploring advanced asynchronous programming patterns in Rust including structured concurrency, cancellation safety, and custom executors.
